recommendations.title: Je Tu Il Elle
recommendations.overview: A woman suffers a subdued psychological breakdown in the wake of a devastating breakup.

recommendations.title: The Uninvited Guest
recommendations.overview: Mysterious events lead an increasingly paranoid architect to believe a stranger is lurking in his large house.

recommendations.title: Epidemic
recommendations.overview: A director and screenwriter pen a script and, in the process, blur the line between fiction and reality.

recommendations.title: Parmanu: The Story of Pokhran
recommendations.overview: A look at India's second confidential nuclear test series at Pokhran lead by Dr. APJ Abdul Kalam, during the time of PM Atal Bihari Vajpayee's tenure.

recommendations.title: Suspense.
recommendations.overview: Abandoned by her maidservant in an isolated country house, a mother must protect herself and her baby from an invading tramp while her husband races home in a stolen car to save them.

recommendations.title: Ju-on: The Grudge 2
recommendations.overview: When the cast and crew of a paranormal TV reality program decide to shoot in the house of the original Saeki hauntings, a series of strange events unfold at the location.

recommendations.title: Aftermath
recommendations.overview: Desperate to save their marriage, a young couple takes a deal to move into their dream home, but disturbing events reveal the house's troubled history.

recommendations.title: Next of Kin
recommendations.overview: After Linda inherits a retirement home, she witnesses a series of strange events which seem connected to a dark and unspeakable evil.

recommendations.title: Buried Alive
recommendations.overview: A college prank at an abandoned house accidentally awakens a frightening spirit.

recommendations.title: The Untamed
recommendations.overview: A meteorite deposits an alien monster with strange powers near the home of an unhappy couple.
